description_long: This object is a military-style cross medal suspended from a dark gray ribbon with a single red vertical stripe near each edge. The cross itself is metallic, with a gold or brass finish and black enamel inlays on the arms, giving it a distinguished and formal appearance. The ribbon is attached to a horizontal bar with spherical finials at each end, and the fabric appears slightly wrinkled, suggesting it is made of a soft, flexible material. The cross is simple in design, with no gemstones or intricate engravings, and the overall motif is geometric and symmetrical. The reverse side of the cross is plain, lacking any additional markings or embellishments. This medal is typically worn pinned to the chest, signifying honor or achievement.
description: A gold and black cross medal hangs from a dark gray ribbon with red stripes, featuring a simple geometric design and a military aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold and black cross medal with the full ribbon and both red stripes visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thinness of the cross and the ribbon, with the spherical finials at the bar's ends visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain gold back of the cross and the reverse side of the ribbon, with no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slim profile of the medal and the attachment bar.
